title: Zed's Create Modpack
description: Play along with Zedaph's Create S3 series! This pack contains the same mods Zed handpicked.
body:
![Zedaph Plays Minecraft Create Season 3 title text on a Create Factory backgroudnd](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/112625f14050c8e77ad50682540e17d5131ee417.png)

This modpack brings together all of the mods that Zedaph is using in his Create Season 3 series on YouTube!

## Features
This modpack is all about [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric)! It includes addons to automate _enchanting_ using [Create Enchantment Industry](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-enchantment-industry-fabric), automate the _[Farmers Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)_ mod using [Create Slice & Dice](https://modrinth.com/mod/slice-and-dice), and a bunch of _decorative blocks_ using [Create Deco](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-deco).

## Playthroughs
